name: khaya-ai
description: Official Khaya AI skills for Claude: speech recognition (ASR), text-to-speech (TTS), and machine translation for African languages.

plugins.name: khaya-ai
plugins.description: Transcribe, synthesize, and translate African languages (Twi, Ewe, Ga, Dagbani, Hausa, Swahili, Yoruba, and more) via the Khaya AI APIs. Requires a Khaya AI API key.
